title: eurya henryi
intro: Eurya henryi is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphylacaceae, commonly known as the Henry's eurya or Chinese rowan. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Eurya henryi include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Eurya henryi typically involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from the leaves and stems, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
